Document:
# Vampire
[color=#999999][italic]"You are not a monster. You are hunger."[/italic][/color]
A vampire is a stealth antagonist who starts the round as a normal crewmember, but gains access to a suite of supernatural powers. Your strength scales with your [bold]total drained blood[/bold], while abilities consume your [bold]current blood pool[/bold].
## Quick Start
Use [bold]Toggle Fangs[/bold] to extend your fangs. Get close to a target and bite to drink blood. Track two things: [bold]total blood drained[/bold] and [bold]current fullness[/bold]. At [bold]150 total blood[/bold], you unlock class selection.
[bold]Important Limitation[/bold] Each target has a cap(200u) on how much blood you can drain from them.
## Base Abilities Every Vampire Has
[bold]Glare[/bold] — paralyzes and silences nearby targets while dealing stamina damage over time. Great for creating a fed window.
[bold]Rejuvenate[/bold] — instantly clears stuns and restores stamina; the stronger version also purges reagents and heals multiple damage types.
## Power System: What Actually Matters!
[bold]Total drained blood[/bold] unlocks new abilities (e.g., 150 / 250 / 400 / 600 / 800 / 1000). [bold]Current blood[/bold] is your “mana” for casting. You can be 1000+ total and still be empty right now. Some high-end effects require [bold]full power[/bold] -> 1000 total blood and 8 unique victims.
## Class Selection
Your class defines your playstyle. You can open these pages any time:
[textlink="Hemomancer" link="VampiresHemomancer"] — blood magic and zone control. [textlink="Umbrae" link="VampiresUmbrae"] — darkness, mobility, ambushes. [textlink="Dantalion" link="VampiresDantalion"] — thralls, illusions, social control. [textlink="Gargantua" link="VampiresGargantua"] — melee, durability, breaking through.
## Holy Weakness
Vampires are vulnerable to holy forces, but [italic]only after they have fed on at least one victim[/italic].
[bold]Holy Water[/bold]: - Deals burn damage to vampires who have fed. - If you haven't drained blood from anyone yet, holy water has no effect on you.
[bold]Holy Place[/bold] - Standing on chapel tiles deals constant burn damage to vampires. - Again, this only activates once you've had at least one victim.
[bold]The Chaplain[/bold] - Chaplains with an active bible are [bold]immune to vampire abilities[/bold]. But once you reach [bold]Full Power[/bold], you can bypass faith protection.
